---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new skill or improvement to an existing skill
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Type

- [ ] New skill proposal
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Existing Skill (if applicable)

Which skill does this relate to?

## Description

What should the skill (or improvement) do? Be specific about the workflow it supports.

## Trigger Phrases

List 3-5 phrases a user might say that should activate this skill:

1. "..."
2. "..."
3. "..."

## Use Cases

When would someone need this? Describe 1-2 concrete scenarios.

## Skill Pattern

Which pattern best fits? (See AGENTS.md for pattern descriptions)

- [ ] Pattern A: Methodology Enforcement (phases, iron laws, verification)
- [ ] Pattern B: Technical Implementation (step-by-step commands)
- [ ] Pattern C: Rule-Based Auditing (severity levels, grading)
- [ ] Pattern D: Automation/Integration (config templates, scripts)
- [ ] Pattern E: Reference/Knowledge (patterns library, best practices)
- [ ] Unsure

## Additional Context

Any related skills, prior art, or references that inform this proposal.
